subject: [PATCH 09/24] nfsd: make nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation bool return

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch changes the nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation to return a boolean value indicating whether processing should continue or not. The patch modifies several callback operations, including CB_NOTIFY, layout preparation, and recall preparation, to return true if successful and false otherwise. This change allows for better error handling in case of allocation failures during callback processing.
